title: Glassy Jelly Briny Vegetables Polish
description: Briny glassy-jelly polish dish featuring raw vegetables, infuse-oil, no onion no garlic friendly. Perfect for a weekend brunch.

ingredients.name: Infused Vegetable Oil
ingredients.notes: Make sure the oil is completely cooled and infused with the flavors of your choice

ingredients.name: Beets
ingredients.notes: Choose beets that are heavy and firm, with no signs of wilting.

ingredients.name: Carrots
ingredients.notes: Choose carrots that are firm and sweet.

ingredients.name: Cucumber
ingredients.notes: Choose a cucumber that is firm and has no signs of wilting.

ingredients.name: Fresh Dill
ingredients.notes: Choose fresh dill that is fragrant and looks healthy.

ingredients.name: Honey
ingredients.notes: Use high-quality honey for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Lemon Juice
ingredients.notes: Use freshly squeezed lemon juice for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use high-quality salt for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Sugar
ingredients.notes: Use high-quality sugar for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Watercress
ingredients.notes: Choose watercress that is fresh and looks healthy.

instructions: In a large bowl, combine the infused oil, beets, carrots, cucumber, and watercress. Mix well to combine.
Taste the salad and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the honey, lemon juice, salt, and sugar until well combined.
Drizzle the honey-lemon dressing over the salad and toss to combine.
Garnish with fresh dill and serve chilled.
